info.title: FlexCharge Subscription Engine API
info.description: API documentation for the FlexCharge Subscription Engine. Supports Tenant Identity, API Key Authentication, Plan and Customer management, Webhook configs, and Customer Portal verification.

get.description: Retrieve all invoices belonging to the tenant. Supports filtering by status, customerId, or subscriptionId.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by invoice status (pending, paid, failed)

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: Filter by Customer ID

parameters.name: subscriptionId
parameters.description: Filter by Subscription ID

get.summary: Get Nomba checkout order details by order reference
get.description:
Fetches a single checkout order from the Nomba API using the order reference returned when the order was created, and merges it with the corresponding FlexCharge invoice record.

**Flow:**
1. Verifies the order reference belongs to the authenticated tenant (ownership check via local Invoice lookup)
2. Calls `GET https://api.nomba.com/v1/checkout/order/{orderReference}` with a valid OAuth2 bearer token
3. Returns a merged payload containing both local audit-trail data and live Nomba business/customer metadata

**Graceful degradation:** If the Nomba API is unavailable, the endpoint returns the local invoice data with a `warning` field instead of failing.

parameters.name: orderReference
parameters.description: The Nomba order reference UUID (stored as `nombaOrderReference` on the Invoice). This is the reference returned when the checkout order was created.

200.description: Merged FlexCharge invoice + live Nomba checkout order details

invoice.description: The FlexCharge internal invoice record (financial audit trail)

nombaOrder.description: Live Nomba checkout order details. null if Nomba is unreachable.

orderId.description: Unique order ID generated by Nomba

accountId.description: The Nomba sub-account whose wallet is credited on payment

amountKobo.description: Amount in Kobo (Nomba decimal converted to our internal integer representation)

amountNaira.description: Original amount string from Nomba in Naira (decimal)

businessLogo.description: URL to the merchant's business logo on Nomba

hasSavedCards.description: True if this customer has previously tokenized cards on Nomba

base64EncodedRsaPublicKey.description: Base64-encoded RSA public key returned if data encryption is enabled on the Nomba account. Empty string if not enabled.

warning.description: Present only when Nomba is unreachable. Describes the degraded response.
warning.example: Could not fetch live Nomba order: Request timeout

404.description: Not Found — no invoice in this tenant's account matches the provided orderReference

error.example: Invoice with order reference '90e81e8a-bc14-4ebf-89c0-57da752cca58' not found

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific invoice by ID.

Fetches the full live status and details of a checkout transaction from Nomba, merged with the corresponding FlexCharge invoice record.

**Wraps:** `GET https://api.nomba.com/v1/checkout/transaction`

**idType Options:**
- `ORDER_REFERENCE` (default) — Use the merchant-supplied reference string (stored as `nombaOrderReference` on the Invoice).
- `ORDER_ID` — Use the UUID that Nomba returns when the checkout order is created.

**Response includes four sections** (Nomba returns only the relevant ones per payment method):
- `order` — always present (order metadata)
- `transactionDetails` — present for card payments (includes tokenization status, payment references)
- `transferDetails` — present for bank transfer payments
- `cardDetails` — present when payment was made by card (masked PAN, card type, bank code)

**This is distinct from `GET /invoices/order/:orderReference`** which fetches static order metadata. This endpoint returns the *transaction outcome* — whether the payment succeeded, how it was paid, and the full payment-method breakdown.

**Graceful degradation:** Returns local invoice data with a `warning` field if Nomba is unreachable.

parameters.name: idType
parameters.description: Which identifier type to use when looking up the transaction on Nomba. Defaults to ORDER_REFERENCE.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The identifier value. Must match the type selected in `idType`.

200.description: Merged FlexCharge invoice + live Nomba checkout transaction details

checkoutTransaction.description: Live Nomba checkout transaction. null if Nomba is unreachable.

success.description: True if the transaction is already completed and successful

transactionDetails.description: Present for card payments. Contains payment gateway references and tokenization status.

tokenizedCardPayment.description: True if paid via a tokenized card (recurring billing)

transferDetails.description: Present for bank transfer payments. Contains NIP session and account details.

cardDetails.description: Present when the payment was made by card. Contains masked PAN and card metadata.

warning.description: Present only when Nomba is unreachable.
warning.example: Could not fetch Nomba checkout transaction: Request timeout

400.description: Bad Request — missing required query parameter 'id'

404.description: Not Found — no invoice in this tenant's account matches the provided id

error.example: No invoice found for ORDER_REFERENCE '90e81e8a-...' in this tenant account

parameters.name: days

get.description:
Fetches the merchant's full list of tokenized cards from Nomba. Supports optional filtering by customer email and date range, with cursor-based pagination.

Proxies to Nomba API: `GET /v1/checkout/tokenized-card-data`

parameters.name: customerEmail
parameters.description: Filter tokenized cards by customer email address

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start of the token creation date window (ISO 8601 date string)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End of the token creation date window (ISO 8601 date string)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: 0-indexed page number. Omit or set to 0 for the first page.

nextPage.description: Cursor for the next page. "0" or empty means no more pages.

total.description: Number of records in this page

hasMore.description: Convenience flag — true when nextPage is non-zero

400.description: Invalid query parameters (e.g. negative page number)

500.description: Internal server error or Nomba API failure

post.description:
Updates the email address associated with a specific tokenized card token.

Nomba validates that `currentEmailAddress` **exactly matches** the email on
record for `tokenKey` before applying the update. If there is a mismatch,
Nomba will return a 400 error.

**Use cases:**
- Customer updates their email address in the merchant's app
- Merging duplicate customer accounts under a new email
- Correcting a typo in the customer's original email

Proxies to Nomba API: `POST /v1/checkout/tokenized-card-data`

tokenKey.description: The token key returned by Nomba when the card was tokenized. Available from GET /api/tokenized-cards.

currentEmailAddress.description: Email address currently associated with this tokenKey in Nomba's vault. Must match exactly — Nomba validates this before applying the update.

newEmailAddress.description: New email address to associate with this tokenKey going forward.

status.description: true when the update was applied successfully

message.description: The new email address now associated with the token

tokenizedCardData.description: The updated card records for this token

400.description: Validation error — missing or invalid request body fields

403.description: Forbidden — insufficient permissions for this operation

404.description: tokenKey not found in Nomba's vault

500.description: Internal server error or Nomba API failure

503.description: Nomba integration not configured (missing NOMBA_CLIENT_ID / NOMBA_CLIENT_SECRET)

delete.description:
Permanently removes a tokenized card from Nomba's vault.

> **⚠️ IRREVERSIBLE**: Once deleted, the `tokenKey` is immediately invalidated
> and can no longer be used for recurring charges. The customer must go through
> the full card-save OTP flow again to re-register their card.

**Use cases:**
- Customer explicitly requests card removal (GDPR / NDPR compliance)
- Merchant cleaning up expired or invalid token keys
- Regulatory or compliance-mandated PII purging

**Note:** Although this is a DELETE request, Nomba requires a JSON body
containing the `tokenKey`. Pass it in the request body as shown.

Proxies to Nomba API: `DELETE /v1/checkout/tokenized-card-data`

tokenKey.description: The token key of the card to permanently delete. Once deleted this tokenKey is invalidated and cannot be recovered.

status.description: true when the card was deleted successfully

400.description: Validation error — missing or invalid request body fields

403.description: Forbidden — insufficient permissions for this operation

404.description: tokenKey not found in Nomba's vault

500.description: Internal server error or Nomba API failure

503.description: Nomba integration not configured (missing NOMBA_CLIENT_ID / NOMBA_CLIENT_SECRET)

get.description:
Retrieves the saved cards for a specific customer, verified by a one-time password.

**Two-step flow (OTP required):**
1. Call `POST /v1/checkout/user-card/saved-card/auth` — Nomba sends an OTP to the customer's registered mobile number.
2. Call this endpoint with the OTP as a query param — Nomba validates the OTP and returns the customer's saved cards.

Proxies to Nomba API: `GET /v1/checkout/user-card/{orderReference}`

parameters.name: orderReference
parameters.description: The original checkout order reference associated with the customer's card

parameters.name: otp
parameters.description: One-time password sent to the customer's registered mobile number. Obtain by calling POST /checkout/user-card/saved-card/auth first.

total.description: Number of saved cards for this customer

400.description: Missing or invalid orderReference path param or otp query param

404.description: Order reference not found or OTP mismatch

500.description: Internal server error or Nomba API failure

post.summary: Request OTP to validate user before fetching saved cards
post.description:
Triggers Nomba to send an OTP SMS to the customer's registered phone number,
authenticating them **before** their previously saved cards are retrieved.

**When to call:**
Call this when `GET /api/checkout/orders/{orderReference}` returns `hasSavedCards: true`.
After the OTP is delivered, submit it via `GET /api/tokenized-cards/user/{orderReference}?otp=<otp>`
to retrieve the customer's saved cards.

**Full flow:**
1. `POST /api/tokenized-cards/user-card/saved-card/auth` ← **this endpoint** — triggers OTP
2. Customer receives OTP via SMS
3. `GET /api/tokenized-cards/user/{orderReference}?otp=<otp>` — returns saved cards

Proxies to Nomba API: `POST /v1/checkout/user-card/saved-card/auth`

orderReference.description: The original checkout order reference. Used by Nomba to look up the customer's registered mobile number.

200.description: OTP dispatched successfully — customer will receive an SMS shortly

nextStep.example: Submit the OTP the customer received via POST /api/tokenized-cards/user-card

data.nextStep: Submit the OTP the customer received via GET /api/tokenized-cards/user/:orderReference?otp=<otp>

400.description: Validation error — missing or invalid request body fields

500.description: Internal server error or Nomba API failure

503.description: Nomba integration not configured (missing NOMBA_CLIENT_ID / NOMBA_CLIENT_SECRET)

post.summary: Request OTP before saving a user's card
post.description:
Triggers Nomba to send an OTP SMS to the customer's registered phone number,
authenticating them **before** their card is saved for future use.

**When to call:**
After a successful checkout payment **and** the customer has opted to save their card
for future recurring charges. Call this endpoint first to dispatch the OTP, then submit
the OTP via `POST /api/tokenized-cards/user-card` to finalise the card save.

**Full card-save flow:**
1. Customer completes payment successfully
2. `POST /api/tokenized-cards/user-card/auth` ← **this endpoint** — triggers OTP
3. Customer receives OTP via SMS
4. `POST /api/tokenized-cards/user-card` — submits OTP to tokenize and save the card

Proxies to Nomba API: `POST /v1/checkout/user-card/auth`

orderReference.description: The original checkout order reference against which the payment was made.

phoneNumber.description: The customer's Nigerian mobile number. Nomba will SMS the OTP to this number. Accepted formats: 08012345678 | +2348012345678.

200.description: OTP dispatched successfully — customer will receive an SMS shortly

nextStep.example: Submit the OTP the customer received via POST /api/tokenized-cards/user-card

data.nextStep: Submit the OTP the customer received via POST /api/tokenized-cards/user-card

400.description: Validation error — missing or invalid request body fields

500.description: Internal server error or Nomba API failure

503.description: Nomba integration not configured (missing NOMBA_CLIENT_ID / NOMBA_CLIENT_SECRET)

post.summary: Submit user OTP to complete card tokenization
post.description:
Submits the OTP the customer received on their mobile phone to Nomba.
On success, Nomba tokenizes and stores the card for future recurring charges.

**This is the FINAL step of the card-save OTP flow:**
1. `POST /api/tokenized-cards/user-card/auth` — triggers OTP
2. Customer receives OTP via SMS
3. `POST /api/tokenized-cards/user-card` ← **this endpoint** — submits OTP, saves card

After this call succeeds, the card's `tokenKey` will appear in future calls to:
- `GET /api/tokenized-cards` (merchant card list)
- `GET /api/tokenized-cards/user/{orderReference}` (customer saved cards)

The `tokenKey` can then be used to charge the customer via the tokenized-card-payment endpoint.

Proxies to Nomba API: `POST /v1/checkout/user-card`

orderReference.description: The original checkout order reference. Must match the reference used in step 1 (POST /user-card/auth).

phoneNumber.description: The customer's Nigerian mobile number. Must match the number used in step 1 (POST /user-card/auth).

otp.description: The one-time code received on the customer's mobile phone. Must be 4–8 numeric digits.

200.description: Card saved successfully — the card has been tokenized and is available for future charges

400.description: Validation error — missing or invalid request body fields

500.description: Internal server error or Nomba API failure

503.description: Nomba integration not configured (missing NOMBA_CLIENT_ID / NOMBA_CLIENT_SECRET)

post.description:
Submits the customer's card credentials to Nomba to initiate a direct card-payment transaction.

**Response code semantics (`data.responseCode`):**
- `"00"` — Payment complete. No further steps needed.
- `"T0"` — Nomba dispatched an OTP to the customer's phone. Next: `POST /api/checkout/card-otp`.
- `"S0"` — 3D Secure authentication required. Redirect to `data.secureAuthenticationData.acsUrl`.

Proxies to Nomba API: `POST /v1/checkout/checkout-card-detail`

key.description: RSA encryption key or empty string

saveCard.description: Save card for future tokenized charges

200.description: Card details accepted — inspect data.responseCode for next step

nextAction.example: An OTP has been sent to the customer. Submit it via POST /api/checkout/card-otp with the transactionId.

secureAuthenticationData.description: Populated only when responseCode is S0

400.description: Validation error — missing or invalid card fields

500.description: Internal server error or Nomba API failure

post.description:
Submits the payment OTP dispatched to the customer's phone during card-detail submission.

**WHEN TO CALL:** Only when `POST /api/checkout/card-detail` returned `responseCode = "T0"`.

**Note:** This is the **payment authorization OTP** — entirely separate from the card-save OTP (`POST /api/tokenized-cards/user-card`).

Proxies to Nomba API: `POST /v1/checkout/checkout-card-otp`

400.description: Validation error — invalid OTP format or missing transactionId

500.description: Internal server error, Nomba API failure, or invalid/expired OTP

post.summary: Resend payment OTP to customer's phone
post.description:
Re-triggers payment OTP dispatch when the customer hasn't received the OTP sent during `POST /api/checkout/card-detail`.

**WHEN TO CALL:** Only after `POST /api/checkout/card-detail` returned `responseCode = "T0"` and the customer reports not receiving the OTP.

Proxies to Nomba API: `POST /v1/checkout/resend-otp`

nextStep.example: Once the customer receives the OTP, submit it via POST /api/checkout/card-otp

400.description: Validation error — missing or invalid orderReference

500.description: Internal server error or Nomba API failure

post.description:
Fetches the checkout transaction details and confirms the final payment status.

**WHEN TO CALL:** After the customer has either:
- Submitted a payment OTP via `POST /api/checkout/card-otp`, OR
- Made a bank transfer to the flash (KTA) account number.

This is the canonical endpoint to get the authoritative status from Nomba. Use the returned `order` object to display a receipt, update your database, and trigger post-payment webhooks.

⚠️ **POLLING:** Do NOT call this in a tight loop. Wait for the customer to complete their action, then call once. If still pending, use exponential backoff or await a Nomba webhook.

Proxies to Nomba API: `POST /v1/checkout/confirm-transaction-receipt`

orderReference.description: The original checkout order reference UUID

200.description: Transaction details fetched — check data.status to confirm payment success

status.description: true when the transaction was successful

order.description: Full order details from Nomba. Null if the order was not found.

accountId.description: Account whose wallet is credited on payment

400.description: Validation error — missing or invalid orderReference

500.description: Internal server error or Nomba API failure

get.summary: Fetch checkout flash account number for bank transfer
get.description:
Returns a dynamically generated flash virtual account number (KTA — Know The Account) that the customer can use to pay via bank transfer instead of card.

The customer transfers exactly the order amount to the returned account from any Nigerian bank. After Nomba receives and confirms the transfer, call `POST /api/checkout/confirm-transaction-receipt` to verify the payment and retrieve the full order receipt.

Proxies to Nomba API: `GET /v1/checkout/get-checkout-kta/{orderReference}`

parameters.name: orderReference
parameters.description: The original checkout order reference UUID

200.description: Flash account details returned — instruct customer to transfer the exact order amount to this account

accountNumber.description: Virtual account number the customer should transfer to

nextStep.description: Next action the integration should take after showing the account details to the customer
nextStep.example: Instruct the customer to transfer exactly the order amount to this account. Then confirm payment via POST /api/checkout/confirm-transaction-receipt.

data.nextStep: Instruct the customer to transfer exactly the order amount to this account. Then confirm payment via POST /api/checkout/confirm-transaction-receipt.

400.description: Validation error — missing or invalid orderReference path parameter

404.description: Order not found for the given orderReference

500.description: Internal server error or Nomba API failure

bearerAuth.description: Provide the Tenant JWT token returned on Registration/Login.

apiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
apiKeyAuth.description: Provide the programmatic API key issued to the Tenant.

portalAuth.description: Provide the short-lived Portal token returned by POST /portal/sessions.

balanceAfter.description: Snapshot of wallet balance after this transaction in Kobo

totalWithdrawn.description: Total amount withdrawn to date in Kobo

tags.name: Invoices
tags.description: Invoice management and Nomba checkout order lookup

tags.name: Tokenized Cards
tags.description: Read-only access to Nomba tokenized card records. Wraps GET /v1/checkout/tokenized-card-data and GET /v1/checkout/user-card/{orderReference}.

tags.name: Checkout
tags.description: Direct card-payment and bank-transfer flows. Covers: card credential submission, payment OTP authorization, OTP resend, transaction receipt confirmation, and flash virtual account lookup for bank transfers. Proxies POST /v1/checkout/checkout-card-detail, POST /v1/checkout/checkout-card-otp, POST /v1/checkout/resend-otp, POST /v1/checkout/confirm-transaction-receipt, GET /v1/checkout/get-checkout-kta/{orderReference}.
